Enum esriRandomFunctionDistributionType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Random distribution type

[Guid("B63373E6-307A-423E-8569-676D85E39BE8")]
public enum esriRandomFunctionDistributionType

Fields

esriRFRandDistBinomial = 7

7: Binomial distribution

esriRFRandDistExponential = 4

4: Exponential distribution

esriRFRandDistGamma = 6

6: Gamma distribution

esriRFRandDistGeometric = 8

8: Geometric distribution

esriRFRandDistNegativeBinomial = 9

9: Negative binomial distribution

esriRFRandDistNone = 0

0: No distribution specified

esriRFRandDistNormal = 3

3: Normal distribution

esriRFRandDistPoisson = 5

5: Poisson distribution

esriRFRandDistUniform = 1

1: Uniform distribution

esriRFRandDistUniformInteger = 2

2: Uniform integer distribution
